context_notes: Phase 21 executed fully (2 plans, 2 waves). All code changes committed. Verifier flagged 6 browser-only items for human testing. User approved the checkpoint without browser testing and wants to come back later to review and make changes. The pricing page now has: dark #050505 hero with dot-grid/blur-orb, volume-based tier cards on dark bg with copper glow hover, 14-day trial banner, 8-question dark FAQ, testimonials section, Enterprise CTA pre-selects sales on contact page.
